menuItems.name: Triple Dipper
menuItems.note: Choose three of the following: Chicken Crispers, Boneless Wings, Southwestern Eggrolls.

menuItems.name: Terlingua Chili
menuItems.note: A hearty blend of chili, topped with cheese.

menuItems.name: Boneless Buffalo Chicken Wings
menuItems.note: Golden fried and tossed in your choice of sauce.

menuItems.name: Mozzarella Sticks
menuItems.note: Golden fried and served with marinara sauce.

menuItems.name: Appetizer Sampler
menuItems.note: A plate to share, must-have Mozzarella Sticks, our famous Spinach & Artichoke Dip, and Boneless Buffalo Wings.

menuItems.name: Santa Fe Chicken Salad
menuItems.note: Grilled chicken, corn, black beans, and cheese.

menuItems.name: Oriental Chicken Salad
menuItems.note: Fresh Asian greens, crispy noodles, toasted almonds, and crisp topped with chicken.

menuItems.name: Grilled Chicken Caesar Salad
menuItems.note: House-braised chicken tossed in our grilled Caesar dressing.

menuItems.name: Buffalo Salad
menuItems.note: Our breaded chicken topped with a mix of greens.

menuItems.name: Double-Glazed Baby Back Ribs
menuItems.note: Served with your choice of two sides.

menuItems.name: Louisiana Pepper Shrimp Pasta
menuItems.note: A combination of Alfredo sauce and Louisiana spices.

menuItems.name: Chicken & Broccoli Alfredo Pasta
menuItems.note: Fettuccine and chicken in our creamy Alfredo sauce.

menuItems.name: Chicken Finger Platter
menuItems.note: Crispy chicken fingers served with choice of dipping sauce.

menuItems.name: Crispy Orange Chicken
menuItems.note: Tender chicken in a sweet orange sauce.

menuItems.name: Fiesta Lime Chicken
menuItems.note: Grilled chicken with a zesty lime sauce.

menuItems.name: Bacon Cheddar Cheeseburger
menuItems.note: Juicy beef burger topped with bacon and cheddar.
